name: Pilates Cookies | Bite-Sized Resets
description:
Enjoy a Pilates Cookie — a bite-sized movement ritual to help you find feel-good ease and be where your feet are.

Through mindful movement, we change ourselves from the inside out. By using gravity as our free training tool—and occasionally bringing in small props for immediate feedback—we can quickly restore alignment, clear the mental clutter, and reset our entire state of being in just a few minutes. This is the power of continuously showing up, one bite-sized piece at a time.

This is why we elevate.

#PilatesCookies #BiteSizedRitual #BeWhereYourFeetAre #MindfulMovement #ElevateWithAndy

name: Shadows & Stars: The Wild Experiment
description:
Welcome to a space where thriving is a wild experiment.

This playlist explores creative projects and everyday habits that go way beyond just "moving well"—taking practices out of the studio and releasing them into real life. It’s where artistic endeavors and everyday play collide.

From deep-diving into D&D characters and digging in the yard, to hanging with furred and feathered friends... it’s all part of the practice.

This is where we find our feet in the dark together, walking amongst the shadows to find our stars.

#WildExperiment #CreativeWellBeing #EmbodiedLiving #DNDCommunity #ElevateWithAndy
